description: Rendering environment font availability: Google Fonts CDN blocked, causing system font fallback that accounts for the remaining 6% pixel difference. This is an environment constraint, not a design issue, but it's worth noting that font fidelity cannot be validated offline.

The Figma screenshot is at 2x retina resolution (640x1114 for a 320x557 design). The visual-compare tool uses the figma.png dimensions as the viewport, which would yield 1:1 at normal DPI. A mismatch between expected render scale and actual component size requires careful calibration of deviceScaleFactor.
